## Product boundary check

- [ ] Keeps the app read-only, or explains why that boundary should change.
- [ ] Does not expose provider keys to the browser.
- [ ] Does not add a generic provider proxy.
- [ ] Fits the no-build Express/EJS/vanilla JS direction.
